acceptedAnswer.text: VisiCardly is a platform for creating digital business cards, link-in-bio pages, and digital menus. You get one shareable URL (visicardly.com/username) and a QR code that consolidates your online presence.
Yes. VisiCardly offers a free plan that lets you create a public profile with essential features. Paid plans unlock advanced features such as multiple pages, QR codes, analytics, and team accounts.

mainEntity.name: How do I share my VisiCardly page?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every account has a public URL at visicardly.com/username. You can share this link on social media, email signatures, printed business cards, or as a QR code that people scan to open your page.

mainEntity.name: Can I use VisiCardly for my restaurant menu?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Menu Builder lets restaurants create digital menus with sections, products, prices, images, opening hours, and contact info. Customers open the menu by scanning a QR code.
Yes. Team plans let organizations invite members, issue branded digital business cards, apply company templates, and organize members into branches or departments.
Yes. Generate QR codes for your profile, menu, or any custom URL. Multiple styles and premium frames are available, and downloads are high-resolution and print-ready.
All purchases are final and non-refundable. We recommend trying the free plan first. In case of duplicate charges due to technical errors, contact support@visicardly.com.

mainEntity.name: Is my data secure and GDPR compliant?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. VisiCardly is GDPR compliant. See our Privacy Policy and GDPR page for details on how we collect, store, and process personal data.

mainEntity.name: Can I use my own domain?

acceptedAnswer.text: Premium plans include white-label options that remove VisiCardly branding. Custom domain support is available on higher tiers.
Email support@visicardly.com or use the contact form at visicardly.com/contact. We typically reply within one business day.
